title: Updates
subtitle: Hyve and add-on updates
page_description: Status for the Hyve platform and installed add-ons. Tap refresh to check GitHub for new versions.
prefs_intro: Configure automatic update checks for Hyve and add-ons. Install updates from the Updates hub page.
hyve_description: Hyve downloads pre-built release packages from GitHub. No Node.js build is required on the server when a release artifact is available.
release_notes_empty: No release notes for this version.
hyve_installing: Updating Hyve… Keep this page open.
confirm_update_hyve: Update Hyve to {version}? The server will restart.
hyve_hint_not_git: Git install required for in-app updates
hyve_hint_no_token: Set HYVE_GITHUB_TOKEN in .env for private repos
hyve_release_not_found: No GitHub release found (check repo visibility or token)
hyve_check_failed: Could not check for Hyve updates
hyve_not_git: Hyve was not installed from git — update manually
hyve_dirty_tree: Commit or stash local changes before updating Hyve: {detail}
hyve_pip_missing: pip not found — install Python dependencies manually
hyve_npm_required: Node.js/npm required before update. Run on the server: {commands}
hyve_frontend_build_failed: Frontend build failed: {detail}. Run on the server: {commands}
hyve_hint_npm_required: Install Node.js/npm before updating — then run: {commands}
hyve_hint_frontend_dist_missing: UI assets missing — run on the server: {commands}
hyve_already_latest: Hyve is already up to date
hyve_no_install_method: No supported update method — release artifact or git install required
hyve_artifact_missing: Release package not found on GitHub for this version
auto_check_hint_hyve: How often to automatically check for new Hyve releases.
check_on_startup_hint: When the server starts, check GitHub for a new Hyve release.
deps_description: Automatic checking and updating of Python packages used by Hyve.
addons_description: Automatic checking for updates of installed add-ons.
auto_check_hint: How often to automatically check for new dependency versions.
auto_check_hint_addons: How often to automatically check for new add-on versions.
auto_update_hint: When updates are found, install them automatically and restart the server. If the update fails, previous versions are restored.
auto_update_hint_addons: When add-on updates are found, install them automatically.
checking: Checking... This may take a few seconds.
check_failed: Update check could not be completed.
installing: Installing... Do not close this page.
confirm_update_all: Update {count} packages? The server will restart.
